rules.description: Never attribute market moves to specific events (geopolitical, economic data, etc.) without explicitly stating 'assuming' or 'if confirmed'. Separate observed price action from assumed causation.
When analyzing cross-asset divergences, quantify the divergence strength and provide historical context for whether this magnitude is significant.
For each setup, include the timeframe context and what invalidates the thesis. Avoid setups that contradict the broader macro thesis without strong technical conviction.
